title: Lily Craft
description: Lily Craft is a modpack that gets used as a support for streamer's projects.
body: Lily Craft is a beautifully curated modpack originally designed for a Twitch streamer's server, now available for everyone to enjoy in single-player worlds. Featuring gorgeous visuals enhanced by Sodium and Iris Shaders, this pack combines creative decor from Macaw's Holidays and Paintings, cozy enhancements like Artifacts and Sophisticated Backpacks, and improved exploration with Nature's Compass and Xaero's Minimap. With unique mobs from Friends & Foes, immersive touches like Simple Voice Chat, and seasonal flair, Lily Craft offers a perfect blend of beauty, community, and adventure.
